summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planora Phase 4 features: Task Categories (5 categories), Calendar Event Overlap Handling (Week/Day views), iCal Export, and Vercel Config. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

minor.issue: Old seeded tasks created before category feature don't have 'category' field (returns undefined). New tasks work correctly.
minor.note: Expected behavior - migration not required for existing data

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/tasks with category='work' - creates task with category
Backend: POST /api/tasks with category='personal' - creates task with category
Backend: POST /api/tasks with category='urgent' - creates task with category
Backend: POST /api/tasks with category='health' - creates task with category
Backend: POST /api/tasks with category='finance' - creates task with category
Backend: POST /api/tasks without category - creates task with null category
Backend: PUT /api/tasks/{id} - updates task category successfully
Backend: GET /api/tasks - returns list of tasks
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - returns valid iCal content with text/calendar content-type
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - has VCALENDAR structure (BEGIN/END, VERSION, PRODID)
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - has VEVENT entries with DTSTART, DTEND, SUMMARY, UID
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - has RRULE for recurring events (FREQ=DAILY, FREQ=WEEKLY)
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - has ATTENDEE entries with mailto:
Backend: GET /api/export/ical - requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: vercel.json exists at /app/frontend/vercel.json
Backend: vercel.json has correct buildCommand='yarn build', outputDirectory='build', framework='create-react-app'
Backend: vercel.json has SPA rewrites to /index.html
Backend: vercel.json has service-worker.js headers (Cache-Control, Service-Worker-Allowed)
Backend: New task category persists in GET after creation
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Task sidebar displays with category filter bar
Frontend: Category filter buttons (All, Work, Personal, Urgent, Health, Finance) all present
Frontend: Task modal opens with category selector
Frontend: Task modal has 5 category pill buttons (Work, Personal, Urgent, Health, Finance)
Frontend: Category selection works (clicking Work highlights it)
Frontend: Tasks with categories show colored labels (e.g., 'Health' with sky-blue dot)
Frontend: Week view displays events correctly
Frontend: Week view shows overlapping events side-by-side (different widths: 174px vs 86px)
Frontend: Day view displays events correctly
Frontend: Day view shows overlapping events side-by-side (Team Standup left=345 width=610, Meeting left=962 width=610)
Frontend: Settings page loads with all sections
Frontend: Settings page has Export Calendar section with 'Download .ics File' button
Frontend: Settings page has Google Calendar section with 'Connect Google Calendar' button
Frontend: Settings page has Booking Link section with URL and copy button
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists for test user. Note: Old seeded tasks don't have category field (created before feature). New tasks created with categories work correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working: 1) Task Categories - 5 categories (work, personal, urgent, health, finance) with colored pill buttons in modal and filter bar in sidebar. Category labels show on task items. 2) Event Overlap Handling - layoutEvents() function in CalendarWeekView.js and CalendarDayView.js correctly positions overlapping events side-by-side using column assignment algorithm. 3) iCal Export - /api/export/ical returns valid .ics file with VCALENDAR, VEVENT, RRULE for recurring events, and ATTENDEE entries. 4) Vercel Config - vercel.json has correct structure with rewrites, headers for service worker. All APIs are real (no mocks).

task_categories.details: 5 categories (work, personal, urgent, health, finance) with colored pill buttons. Category selector in TaskModal, filter bar in TaskSidebar, colored labels on task items.

event_overlap_handling.details: layoutEvents() function uses greedy column assignment. Week view: overlapping events have different widths (174px vs 86px). Day view: overlapping events positioned side-by-side (left=345 vs left=962).

ical_export.details: /api/export/ical returns text/calendar with attachment header. Contains VCALENDAR, VEVENT, RRULE for recurring events, ATTENDEE entries. Settings page has Download .ics File button.

vercel_config.details: vercel.json has buildCommand='yarn build', outputDirectory='build', framework='create-react-app', SPA rewrites, service-worker headers.
